data.name: Ghost Milf
data.detailed_description:
Ever been scared and horny at the same time? Now it’s time to experience both in one place.

Ghost Milf is a fast-paced 2D Hentai game where you explore a Haunted Apartment while a seductive, Mommy-kink Ghost Milf constantly teases, tempts, and distracts you.

She’s everywhere - whispering, touching, and sabotaging your progress with her overwhelming lust.
Will you surrender to her seduction, or keep pushing forward… knowing it will only lead to even more lewdness?

How long will it take before you fall for her gentle touch… or have you already fallen, just waiting for the right ghost to claim you? After all, it must be right if it feels so good…

Summary:
Each day, you must locate a randomly generated card hidden in one of the five map locations to progress in the game. In certain areas, a ghost ambush can occur once per day, temporarily seducing you. During this encounter, a timed quick-response choice will determine whether you give in... or resist her temptation.



Did the description awaken your horny curiosity? If so, make sure to add the game to your wishlist so you’ll know exactly when it’s time to play with this seductive ghost.

data.short_description: 👻 Ghost Milf is a fast-paced 2D Hentai game 😈 where you explore a Haunted Apartment while a seductive, Mommy-kink Ghost Milf ❤️ constantly teases, tempts, and distracts you. 👻

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 410 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.6 or later
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 410 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 410 MB 可用空間
